scripts.coverage: tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 --experimental-test-coverage src/admin/admin.service.test.ts src/admin/admin-catalog.service.test.ts src/admin/admin-provider-credential.service.test.ts src/auth/auth-cookie.service.test.ts src/auth/auth.service.test.ts src/auth/super-admin-bootstrap.service.test.ts src/conversation-transfer/conversation-transfer.service.test.ts src/security/crypto.service.test.ts src/security/email-protection.service.test.ts src/security/password.service.test.ts src/persistence/database.integration.test.ts
scripts.dev: node ../../scripts/run-with-port.mjs 3002 pnpm exec tsc-watch --project tsconfig.json --onSuccess "node dist/main.js"
scripts.prepare:test-deps: pnpm --filter @lxp/domain build && pnpm --filter @lxp/contracts build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-sdk build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-anthropic build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-deepseek build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-google build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-groq build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-mistral build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-moonshot build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-nanogpt build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-ollama build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-openai build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-openrouter build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-xai build && pnpm --filter @lxp/provider-zai build
scripts.test: tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 src/admin/admin.service.test.ts src/admin/admin-catalog.service.test.ts src/admin/admin-provider-credential.service.test.ts src/auth/auth-cookie.service.test.ts src/auth/auth.service.test.ts src/auth/super-admin-bootstrap.service.test.ts src/conversation-transfer/conversation-transfer.service.test.ts src/security/crypto.service.test.ts src/security/email-protection.service.test.ts src/security/password.service.test.ts src/persistence/database.integration.test.ts
